reviews.title: honest review
reviews.text: I booked this accommodation because I had a long lay over in manila. This place is terrible. When I enter in that partition room, cockroaches are there. Electric fan is barely working and the shared toilets are terrible. Cannot recommend at all.

reviews.title: Not satisfied with the stay

reviews.negatives: The venue did not meet our expectations like we expected it to be better advanced booking etc. but when we went there it's like the Receptionist don't know what room we got or what should they took us a long time for them to decide and it took them 3 people to decide what room we got and the room we got is a PWD room a busted door di pukpok para maisara at makapasok the room we got a had blinds  in the window if you go outside and position yourself in an angle they can see you no privacy for a stay there its not that comfortable I hope they can improve that area so we decided to find another place in the middle of the night I hope they can be better

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: It was way over priced, I got a discount from 1800 pesos down to 1200 pesos but it was over priced even at 1200 pesos, no ac, no attached bathroom.   another couple only paid 800 pesos for same room and that is all about what it was worth. I went to another hotel the next day for about  same price and was much better

reviews.title: Avoid at all cost
reviews.text: Arrived in the middle of the night after a long flight and the woman staff was forcing me to cancel my booking because they had no room available. She was very rude and was blaming me for the mishap. Very very bad experience. It was in the of the night in the middle of nowhere manila and she was turning me away even though I had a valid reservation and did not try to find a solution. Im thankful for the guy staff from airport hostel who found a fix for me. As for that woman wala kang modo. Walang kwentang hotel.

reviews.title: Dont do it!
reviews.text: Rooms are too small. Bathrooms are not in the room. Its community bathrooms, so you have to walk from your room to the community area and there is where the toilets, and showers are.  Curtains on showers and doors for toilets, but thats about as much privacy as you get. We didnt end up staying there. Also, it was non refundable, so I forfeited the money I had already paid, and we found a different hotel to stay.  So. If that tells you anything about how disappointing it was, then you will understand the title of this review.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Booked in for a single budget room however only came with a fan and was far too hot to stay in the room, asked for an upgrade to a room with AC and asked for further 650pesos. I am happy to pay but checked and there is no option to book AC room via booking.com or indication that there are different types of room. Seemed as if they chose the extra rate out of nowhere rather than being a set price

reviews.title: Do not be deceived.
reviews.text:
Remember the following information: 
First, the location is difficult to find. 
Second, the facility is understaffed. 
Everything was misleading. 
There are no restrooms inside and only an old fan. 
The outdoor restroom is uncomfortable. 
Though it is inexpensive, the quality does not meet expectations. 
The facility is old and there is no parking area. 
You can hear people speaking outside.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Fan Room With Shared Bathroom

reviews.negatives: Wir hatten das Zimmer direkt neben dem Pool. Es war sehr laut.. bis lange in die Nacht und dann frühen Morgen. Ohrenpax waren nötig.

reviews.title: MODUS SALE
reviews.text: I booked a double economy room during a sale and I also used a voucher so of course I would save quite a lot but when we arrive at the place, the receptionist is asking  for an additional fee (which is 80% higher of what paid already) kasi raw there was a technical error with agoda during the time I booked it. The problem here is that I already texted them the day before my arrival and an hour before it but they never told me about it. I had to look for a new place to stay because the amount I need to add is not worth to stay. Big inconvenience. I read a review with almost the same experience as mine, I should have believe her.

The shared toilets and shower rooms were all very clean and again there are no shelves to put your toiletries when brushing your teeth and when getting ready.

reviews.title: Poor Hotel
reviews.text: The staff are not helpful at all cost. Our requeat is not available. I stayed in a hotel local and international even 1 star hotel is better than this hotel. All I thought it was a nice place cause it was recommended by a frend from dubai but its a worst hotel. And will never recommend this to anyone.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I'm searching for hotel that allows quarantine and courtyard hotel appears and Agodas site it says that you can stay easyly during your quarantine. So I expected this hotel allows quarantine. And before I booked I call the hotel if they will pick and drop in the airport they said yes. And they don't explain that I need to pay for the pickup. I never asked also because in Japan if they talk about Money they explain everything. I forget it's Philippine hahaha. And need to fill up what time they expect you. So I thought that they already at the airport at the time I filled up. But my brother can't find them. When they call they ask money for pickup 😅 haha. And they told that they don't accept for quarantine, so they transferred my brother to stone house hotel which is the stone house hotel also no explanation about the room especially about their phones how to contact to the front hotel . So what the meaning of the quarantine that my brother go out to buy his food or if he have something to buy to gout the room to buy for his self😅. And I talk to the stone house hotel about the breakfast free why they don't ask my brother and they don't deliver it. She is it's just a coffee and bread. I said even it's bread or coffee ask him if he need it or not then deliver it. She said ok ma'am. But next day no delivery. And because I booked only 3 day for my brother and need 5 days. On 3 days the stone house hotel ask my brother if he want to move to courtyard hotel which I booked him. I wonder why they ask my brother to move back to courtyard which the courtyard reject first because not allowed for quarantine 😅 and my brother not yet finished his quarantine 😅 😅😱 only in the Philippines😱

reviews.title: Reassured us they were quarantine accredited were not
reviews.text: By the time we found out they were not actually quarantine accredited like they insisted it was too late to cancel and are now out the money spent as far as the rest goes only gave 1 star because we have no idea as to the rest

reviews.title: Worst hotel I've ever booked!
reviews.text:
Don't waste your time and money booking on this or even just thinking of booking in this place. Your booking details and even the room is very different when you arrive at their place. This is an honest review for someone like me whose been traveling a lot. And this is really the WORST HOTEL I'VE EVER BOOKED!

reviews.title: A Courtyard that is not a Hotel
reviews.text: I am a USA Courtyard Hotel satisfied customer. When I was in the Phil’s and saw the name Courtyard Hotel I draw down my guard as I was not looking /browsing at the rooms. I find out when I come to the property to check in for my booking its not being affiliated with the real Courtyard Hotel. The rooms are small, not air conditioned and worst the bathroom is outside the room and being shared with other room occupants/guests. And narrow watery (undrained from the rain) alley to walk through before you get to the property.

reviews.text: No available toiletries. The shower is is not safe,   you might be electricuted once you tough it.  There's a water shortage.

reviews.title: Not too conducive
reviews.text: Masyadong papasok parang kasama lang  sa mga common settlers. Staff are disorganized, no proper turn over ang pangit talga. They were not that honet in the ads, it is not indicated that CR is shared OMG!

reviews.title: Not recommended for quarantine purposes
reviews.text: The room available was only a room with electric fan, so my wife thought there could be at least a window, but the room was so enclosed. I have to transfer her to a more comfortable room on site. Outside her new room, there were always “tambays” playing online games without even wearing facemasks. She informed guys on the reception but as days pass by the “tambays” were still there. It was an accredited quarantine facility by DOH but there were many bystanders who i think not even guests in the hotel.
